rules.name: SE_Invoice_BPartner
rules.description: Auto-fill partner address, payment terms, price list from business partner. Classic UI only.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set address, payment terms, and price list after choosing a business partner.

rules.name: SE_Invoice_BPartnerLocation
rules.description: Cascade on partner address change. Classic UI only.
rules.impactIfOmitted: No cascade on address change.

rules.name: SL_Invoice_DocType
rules.description: Auto-fill payment terms and method from document type. Classic UI only.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set payment terms and method.

rules.name: SE_Invoice_AccountingDate
rules.description: Auto-fill accounting date. Backend default applies on save.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Backend sets accounting date on save.

rules.name: SL_Invoice_PriceList
rules.description: Cascade on price list change. Classic UI only.
rules.impactIfOmitted: No cascade on price list change.

rules.name: SL_Invoice_Product
rules.description: Auto-fill price, UOM, tax from product selection. Classic UI only.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users must manually set price, UOM, and tax after selecting a product.

rules.name: SL_Invoice_Amt
rules.description: Recalculate line amount on quantity/price change. Backend handles on save.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line amounts calculated by backend on save.

rules.name: SL_Invoice_Conversion
rules.description: UOM conversion calculation. Backend handles on save.
rules.impactIfOmitted: UOM conversion calculated by backend.

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity
rules.description: Converts operative quantity to base quantity. Backend handles on save.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity calculated by backend.

rules.name: VAL_BPartnerLocation_BillTo
rules.description: Filters partner address selector to bill-to locations of the selected business partner.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select irrelevant addresses.

rules.name: VAL_DocType_APInvoice
rules.description: Filters document type to AP invoices and credit memos (IsSOTrx=N).
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select wrong document types.

rules.name: VAL_User_BPartnerContact
rules.description: Filters user/contact to contacts of the selected business partner.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select contacts from other business partners.

rules.name: VAL_User_OrgTree
rules.description: Filters company agent to users in the organization hierarchy.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select agents outside their org tree.

rules.name: VAL_Project_StatusAndBPartner
rules.description: Filters project to open/ordered projects for the selected business partner.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select closed or unrelated projects.

rules.name: VAL_PriceList_IsSOTrx
rules.description: Filters price list to purchase price lists (IsSOTrx=N).
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select sales price lists for purchase invoices.

rules.name: VAL_PaymentMethod_Account
rules.description: Filters payment method to valid AP payment methods with accounts.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select payment methods without AP accounts.

rules.name: VAL_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date
rules.description: Filters tax selector to purchase taxes valid for the invoice date.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could select sales taxes or expired taxes.

rules.name: READONLY_Processed_Header
rules.description: Most header fields become read-only when document is processed (Processed=Y). Covers: documentNo, invoiceDate, businessPartner, partnerAddress, currency, paymentTerms, paymentMethod, priceList, transactionDocument.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit fields on confirmed invoices, breaking data integrity.

rules.name: READONLY_Processed_Lines
rules.description: Line fields become read-only when parent header is processed. Covers: lineNo, product, invoicedQuantity, unitPrice, tax, description.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could edit lines on confirmed invoices.

rules.name: READONLY_ReversedInvoice_Processed
rules.description: Reversed invoice reference becomes read-only when document is processed.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could modify reversal links on processed invoices.

rules.name: DISPLAY_OperativeQty_WhenApplicable
rules.description: Operative quantity and UOM shown only when product has UOM management active.
rules.impactIfOmitted: Operative quantity fields always visible.
